description: Skill router for /wf-design. 22 sub-commands across 6 categories — Planning (shape), Contract (craft), Read-only inspection (extract), Review (audit, critique), Transformation (animate, bolder, clarify, colorize, delight, distill, harden, layout, onboard, optimize, overdrive, polish, quieter, typeset, adapt), Context (setup, teach). Three invocation modes — workflow stage 2b (/wf-design <slug>), workflow + sub-command (/wf-design <slug> <sub>), freestanding (/wf-design <sub>). No sweep mode — sub-commands are stage-gated operators, not orthogonal lenses on a shared target. Workflow modes write 02b-design.md (shape), 02c-craft.md (craft), 07-design-audit.md (audit), 07-design-critique.md (critique), or design-notes/<sub>-<timestamp>.md (transformations + extract). Invoke as /wf-design <args>.
